narrative:
Seven Hills-01-A (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,149 registered voters, with 52.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 26.2%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.8 percentage points.
